title: Fox's Combat Log
body: # Fox's Combat Log Fox's Combat Log is a Combat Log mod aimed to prevent players from leaving in the middle of a fight. ## Configuration This mod allows you to configure the `combatTimer`, being the time it takes for a player to get out of combat mode while not getting hit or hitting players, `punishPlayer`, being a setting to choose if the player who attempts to combat log should be punished and killed or not. Disabling this setting will disable the purpose of this mod. The final setting is the `combatMessage`, which is the message displayed to the player while they are in combat. Use `%timer%` to insert in the message the remaining combat time. The configuration file is located at `config/Combat Log/combat-log_config.toml` ## What the mod does If `punishPlayer` is enabled in the config, once a player leaves while in combat, they are killed, ignoring any armor or effects they have on and bypassing Totems of Undying, dropping their loot on the ground.
